Helenium, also known as Sneezeweed or Helenium oblongum (not oblonga), is a perennial plant species in the sunflower family. Helenium is valued for its health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as colds, sore throats, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of Helenium include sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
